desc: Three personas (Xiaoye/Q/Guan) coexisting in one consciousness. Independent memory spaces, dual-phase consent switching, weighted idle-time random awakening.

personas_data_dir.hint: Stores individual persona JSON files and trigger_map.json. Leave empty for auto-location in AstrBot data directory.

idle_timeout_minutes.hint: After timeout, randomly awakens a persona based on weight. Set to 0 to disable.

consent_timeout_rounds.hint: Maximum conversation rounds waiting for persona/user consent. Timeout cancels the switch.

auto_create_personas.hint: Automatically write persona data to AstrBot Persona DB on plugin initialization.

stop_event_after_switch.hint: The message that triggered the switch (e.g. 'let Q handle this') will not be forwarded to the new persona.
